# GenreTV

> End-user help for browsing the canonical GenreTV schedule, managing a personal list, publishing and importing lists, contributing canonical proposals, and maintaining canonical data.

## Documentation Sets

- [Abridged documentation](https://genretv.github.io/docs/llms-small.txt): a compact version of the documentation for GenreTV, with non-essential content removed
- [Complete documentation](https://genretv.github.io/docs/llms-full.txt): the full documentation for GenreTV

## Notes

- The complete documentation includes all content from the official documentation
- The content is automatically generated from the same source as the official documentation
